title: Nitronic Metallurgy
description: ⚔This mod allow you to make new alloys to craft different equipment and blocks⚔
body:
Requires **[CURIOS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)** and **[GECKOLIB](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)**

I recommend using [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) to be able to see the items recipes.

Nitronic metallurgy allow you to make new alloys to craft equipment.The main item of the mod is the nichrome alloy which can be used to make the different toolsand armor. The progression is straight forward , just read the tool tips and jei explanations and you'll know what to do. 

The mod is still beign updated so feel free to make a suggestion.
